title: Federal Funding — Health Agencies
content:
Health-focused federal sponsors listed by Morgan State ORA on the Funding Sources page:

- National Institutes of Health (NIH) Office of Extramural Research — https://grants.nih.gov/grants/oer.htm
- Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration (SAMHSA) grants — http://www.samhsa.gov/grants/

NIH is the primary biomedical and behavioral health research funder in the U.S., supporting R01, R15, R21, K-series, F-series, and T-series mechanisms among others. Morgan PIs should also see HBCU/MSI-specific NIH programs including NIGMS SuRE, NIMHD RCMI, and NCI CURE (documented in opportunity_category_hbcu_msi).
